_doc: Pixel-coord map for AoE3 DE Skirmish lobby at 1920x1080. Empirically verified 2026-04-28 against game v100.15.59076.0 P2 with Legendary Leaders AI mod. Use with lobby_driver.py.

lobby._opponent_pickers_doc: Civ picker buttons for AI slots P2..P8. P1 is at y=170; in_game_driver.py empirically measured P2/P3/P4 at y=276/382/488 (106px row spacing). P5..P8 extrapolated with the same delta — verified-good coords if the lobby has 8 player rows visible (FFA 1v7 default). x=630 matches p1_civ_picker. Used by matrix_runner --opponent-civs to test up to 8 civs per match.

civ_picker._doc: Opened by clicking lobby.p1_civ_picker. List shows 10 civs at a time, alphabetical. Wheel-down at scroll_anchor scrolls ~0.74 rows per click (use picker_scroll_table.json for accurate scroll counts). Row label centers empirically detected at Y=284, 348, 412, ..., 860 with spacing 64.

popups._doc: Y-positions of options in each dropdown popup. The popup typically expands DOWN from the dropdown header. X-center may differ from header x because popups can flow left/right.

diff_thresholds._doc: AE-pixel-count thresholds for state detection. Below noise_floor = same screen. Above significant_change = real UI state change.
